series_metadata.series_description: Dealers in motor fuel that are strictly exporters of the fuel and do not sell fuel in Ohio, file this report to show detail information on the fuel purchased in Ohio for exportation outside of the state.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years after end of calendar year in which report was filed. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after end of calendar year in which report was filed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
